title: Console Refined
description: Mixing modern enhancements with the console experience to keep the game performant and pleasing.
body:
**Description:**

Blending the nostalgic console experience with subtle modern enhancements, all while keeping performance smooth and familiar.

<details>
<summary>Visual Features</summary>

- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
- [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby)
- [Entity View Distance](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-view-distance)
- [Glowtone](https://modrinth.com/mod/glowtone)
- [Particle Effects](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-effects)
- [Particular Reforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/particular-reforged)
- [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality)
- [Void Fog](https://modrinth.com/mod/void-fog)

</details>




<details>
<summary>QOL Features</summary>

- [Armor Statues](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-statues)
- [Better Night Vision](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternightvision)
- [Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes)
- [Chat Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatpatches)
- [DualBar](https://modrinth.com/mod/dualbar)
- [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
- [Entity Sound Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/esf)
- [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
- [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)
- [Legacy4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j)
- [Locator Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/locator-heads)
- [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps)
- [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered)
- [Plasmo Voice](https://modrinth.com/plugin/plasmo-voice)
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify)
- [World Edit](https://modrinth.com/mod/worldedit)
- [Variants CIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Performance</summary>

- [Better Biome Reblend](https://modrinth.com/mod/bbrb)
- [Chat Signal Hider](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-signing-hider)
- [Chunky](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunky)
- [Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify)
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)
- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton)
- [Lazy Language Loader](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazy-language-loader)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [Marlow's Crystal Optimizer](https://modrinth.com/mod/marlow-crystal-optimizer)
- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)
- [ScalableLux](https://modrinth.com/mod/scalablelux)

</details>




<details>
<summary>Resourcepacks</summary>

- [Turtorial World Addon](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tutorial-world-addon)
- [Mace but 3D](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mace-but-3d-resourcepack)

- [Fresh Flower Pots](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-flower-pots)
